Video.summary: Government agent Randy Bowers (John Wayne) is accused of shooting up a saloon and has to escape from the jail to find the man behind the murders.
Video.title: Randy Rides Alone

Video.summary: Ted and Dusty infiltrate a band of outlaws to get close to Mr. Gentry, the man who murdered Ted's father.
Video.title: West of the Divide

Video.summary: The Three Mesquiteers (Robert Livingston, Ray Corrigan, Max Terhune) discover a painted horse and a fandango dancer.
Video.title: Hit the Saddle

Video.summary: Returning to his California ranch for some rest and relaxation, cowboy movie star Roy Rogers (Roy Rogers) finds himself drawn into battle with a dastardly group of horse rustlers.
Video.title: Under California Stars

Video.summary: A convent-raised woman (Martha Vickers) learns of her American Indian heritage through romance with an educated Navajo (Philip Reed) during the 1880s.
Video.title: Daughter of the West

Video.summary: A state ranger (Roy Rogers) clears a crusading judge framed for a bank robbery.
Video.title: Idaho

Video.summary: President Grant helps a cavalry major (Dale Robertson) condemned for helping Dakota Chief Sitting Bull (J. Carrol Naish).
Video.title: Sitting Bull

Video.summary: An Easterner (George O'Brien) finds rustlers and a sweetheart (Irene Hervey) on the ranch he inherited out West.
Video.title: The Dude Ranger

Video.summary: A rancher (John Mack Brown) makes his cousin (John Wayne) trail boss on a cattle drive headed for trouble.
Video.title: Hell Town

Video.summary: A cowboy (Jack Perrin) and his sidekick (Frank Rice) pursue a gang of smugglers and save a Mexican dancer (Tina Menard).
Video.title: Loser's End

Video.summary: The frontier hero (Roy Rogers) sings and saves Civil War gold with his sidekick (George "Gabby" Hayes).
Video.title: Young Bill Hickok

Video.summary: When a young man discovers gold, he must deal with threats.
Video.title: Death Valley

Video.summary: A cattle rancher's daughter (Susan Hayward) turns Oklahoma wildcatter with a geologist (Robert Preston) and an Indian (Pedro Armendáriz) as partners.
Video.title: Tulsa

Video.summary: The Younger Brothers, certain their past with the Quantrill Riders prevents them from living an honest life, plan a bold bank robbery that Matt and Frankie attempt to thwart.
Video.title: The Younger Brothers

Video.summary: Matt investigates the deaths of two Osage Indians.
Video.title: John Wesley Hardin

Video.summary: Tiburcio Vasquez vows vengeance against Anglos after his sister Dolores is killed; Matt and Frankie try to stop his years of terror in Southern California after a railroad agent is killed with the help of local priest.
Video.title: Tiburcio Vasquez

Video.summary: A phony sheriff is part of a rustling scheme.
Video.title: Phony Sheriff

Video.summary: Cisco and Pancho capture a notorious bank robber after falling for a trap set by the criminal's sister.
Video.title: Pancho Held Hostage

Video.summary: Cisco and Pancho discover the shady motives of a lawyer hired to change a rancher's will.
Video.title: Uncle Disinherits Niece

Video.summary: Cisco and Pancho attempt to convince a freighting company owner that her competitor did not steal from her wagons.
Video.title: Freight Line Feud

Video.summary: The Cartwrights befriend a boy whose father has been sent to jail and whose mother has recently died.
Video.title: Feet of Clay

Video.summary: Little Joe falls for a girl who has been disowned by her people because they think she is a witch and, therefore, an outcast.
Video.title: Dark Star

Video.summary: A wanderer seeking his parents' lynchers, arrives in Virginia City as Ben and Adam are convicted of murder.
Video.title: The Avenger

Video.summary: When a neighbor agrees to sell his property, the Cartwrights fear the loss of water rights for their cattle.
Video.title: Bitter Water

Video.summary: The 1850s California gold fields is home to notorious bandit Joaquin Murietta; Matt and Frankie arrive to track him down but he kidnaps Frankie; Matt and Captain Love trail Murietta to the bitter end.
Video.title: Joaquin Murietta
